hero.headline: We Build Digital
hero.sub: Custom web products, AI automation, and cutting-edge design — engineered to stand out.

about.title: A Studio at the Intersection of Code & Creativity
about.body: E3pr0m-UX is a boutique digital agency specializing in high-performance web products, intelligent automation systems, and experience-first design. We work with startups, scale-ups, and enterprise teams that refuse to settle for ordinary.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end digital solutions tailored to your business goals.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: React, Next.js, and modern stacks. From landing pages to complex web applications — fast, accessible, and scalable.

items.title: AI & Automation
items.desc: Custom AI integrations, workflow automation, chatbots, and intelligent data pipelines that save time and cost.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.desc: Brand identity, design systems, prototypes, and user research. We design experiences users remember.

items.title: Custom Web Products
items.desc: SaaS platforms, internal tools, dashboards, and MVPs — built from scratch with your exact requirements.

portfolio.title: Selected Projects
portfolio.subtitle: A curated selection of work we're proud of.

items.title: NeuralFlow SaaS
items.desc: AI-powered workflow automation platform with real-time analytics.

items.title: Apex Commerce
items.desc: High-performance e-commerce solution with custom checkout experience.

items.title: Luminos Brand
items.desc: Full brand identity and design system for a tech startup.

items.title: DataPulse Dashboard
items.desc: Real-time analytics dashboard with complex data visualizations.

items.title: ChatCore API
items.desc: Custom LLM integration layer for enterprise customer support.

items.title: PortalX Intranet
items.desc: Enterprise intranet portal with SSO and permission management.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No surprises. Scope-aligned packages with clear deliverables.
